mapper.sql: role_id, role_name, role_name_zn, home_page, priority, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.insert: insert into t_role (role_id, role_name, role_name_zn, home_page, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values (#{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleNameZn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{homePage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into t_role
role_id,
role_name,
role_name_zn,
home_page,
priority,
status,
create_by,
create_time,
update_by,
update_time,
remark,
#{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{roleNameZn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{homePage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_role
role_name = #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
role_name_zn = #{roleNameZn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
home_page = #{homePage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
priority = #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_role set role_name = #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, role_name_zn = #{roleNameZn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, home_page = #{homePage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, priority = #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where role_id = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select count(*) from t_role
role_name like CONCAT("%", #{model.roleName}, "%")
role_name_zn like CONCAT("%", #{model.roleNameZn}, "%")
and ( role_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or role_name_zn like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
select * from t_role where FIND_IN_SET(role_name, #{_parameter}) and status = 1
